calendar.matters:
MASTER CALENDAR JURY
Off Calendar Dec-08-2004 Off Calendar

MANDATORY SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Dec-08-2004 Off Calendar
MINI MINUTES: APPEARANCES: ROBERT YIN CHAN FOR PLAINTIFF ERIC SUN ALSO PRESENT
MICHAEL LAM IN PRO PER

SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE HELD. CASE SETTLED ON RECORD. TERMS AS FOLLOWS: DEFENDANT TO VACATE PREMISES AT 436 DWIGHT STREET BY 1/8/05, 11:59PM. ALL PERSONS AND POSSESSIONS TO BE REMOVED AND PROPERTY TO BE LEFT IN A BROOM CLEAN CONDITION. ANY PROPERTY LEFT BEHIND TO BE DEEMED ABANDONED. KEYS TO BE RETURNED TO PLAINTIFFS ATTORNEY BY 1/9/05. PLAINTIFF WILL ISSUE A $1500 CHECK TO PLAINTIFF WITHIN 7 DAYS OF 1/8/05. DEFENDANT WILL SIGN A FORMAL RELEASE AND BOTH PARTIES WAIVE ALL CLAIMS THAT ARISE FROM TENANCY. IF DEFENDANT COMPLIES WITH TERMS OF AGREEMENT, PLAINTIFF WILL FILE A DISMISSAL WITH PREJUDICE.
IF DEFENDANT DOES NOT COMPLY, PLAINTIFF, BY DECLARATION, MAY FILE FOR STIPULATED JUDMGENT FOR POSSESSION AND FULL DAMAGES AS SET FORTH IN THE COMPLAINT.

JUDGE PRO TEM:GUY STILSON; CLERK:BARBARA MORRIS; REPORTER:TINA PAXTON (218)
